name: Strawberry Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 box Betty Crocker White Cake Mix
1/2 cup frozen strawberries, do not drain
1/2 cup frozen strawberries, do not drain
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all cake ingredients together.
2. Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit and bake for 50 minutes.
3. Combine icing ingredients and spread over warm cake.
